screens.layoutHierarchy:
DisputeEntryPoster
├── Header
│   ├── Title: "Report an issue"
│   └── Subtitle: "Disputes pause payment and require review."
├── ProofReview (read-only)
├── ReasonSelector
│   ├── Incomplete work
│   ├── Wrong task completed
│   ├── Quality issue
│   └── Other (240 char limit)
├── EvidenceHint
└── ActionFooter
    ├── OpenDisputeButton (HX-Button/Primary)
    └── CancelLink

screens.entry: Task Active / Proof Awaiting → state = DISPUTED
screens.layoutHierarchy:
DisputeStatusHustler
├── StatusHeader
│   ├── StatusBadge: "DISPUTE IN REVIEW"
│   └── ExplanationText
├── WhatThisMeans
├── YourSubmission (read-only)
├── WhatHappensNext
└── SupportBoundary

DisputeStatusPoster
├── StatusHeader
│   ├── StatusBadge: "UNDER REVIEW"
│   └── ExplanationText: "Your dispute is under review. Payment is paused."
├── DisputeSummary (reason, time opened)
├── WhatHappensNext
└── SupportBoundary

DisputeResolution
├── ResolutionHeader
│   ├── ResolutionType
│   └── OutcomeText
├── FinancialOutcome (explicit dollars)
├── ExplanationCard
└── CloseButton

forbidden: Color shifts implying victory or loss

screens.accessibility:
- All screens announce state: "Dispute under review. Payment paused."
- Reading order linear
- Reduced Motion: default

screens.name: Earnings / Wallet
screens.purpose: Explain where money is, why it's there, and when it moves
screens.layoutHierarchy:
EarningsScreen (ScrollView)
├── BalanceHeader (HX-Card/Elevated)
│   ├── AvailableBalance (--hx-num-hero, primary)
│   ├── PendingBalance (--hx-num-medium, secondary)
│   └── PayoutStatusHint (--hx-text-footnote)
├── TransferStatusCard (HX-Card/Secondary)
│   ├── TransferState (dynamic)
│   └── TimingExplanation
├── EarningsBreakdown
│   ├── EarningsRow (repeat, HX-Card/Primary list style)
│   └── Pagination / LoadMore
├── BankInfo (HX-Card/Secondary)
│   ├── BankName
│   ├── LastFourDigits
│   └── ChangeBankLink
└── SafeAreaBottom
screens.accessibility:
- Screen announces: "Earnings. Available one hundred twenty dollars. Pending forty-five dollars."
- Each row announces status
- Reduced Motion: default (already minimal)
- Contrast: AAA for balances, AA+ elsewhere

screens.name: Home (Hustler Mode)
screens.purpose: Surface available work while enforcing pacing and constraints
screens.layoutHierarchy:
HomeHustlerScreen (ScrollView)
├── Header
│   ├── Greeting (time-of-day only)
│   └── LocationIndicator
├── ActiveTaskBanner (conditional, HX-Card/Elevated)
│   ├── ActiveTaskSummary
│   └── ResumeButton (HX-Button/Primary)
├── ConstraintBanner (conditional)
│   └── ConstraintMessage
├── TaskFeedHeader
│   ├── SectionTitle: "Available tasks"
│   └── SortControl
├── TaskFeed
│   ├── TaskRow (HX-TaskRow/Available, repeat)
│   └── EmptyState (conditional)
└── SafeAreaBottom
rules: Must **not** pressure the user into accepting work when already committed.
screens.accessibility:
- Greeting announced once
- Active task announced before feed
- Task rows: "Assemble IKEA Desk. Forty-five dollars. Two point one miles."
- Reduced Motion: default (already minimal)

---

screens.name: Poster Review / Confirmation
screens.entry: Push notification or task list → "Proof submitted"
screens.layoutHierarchy:
PosterReviewScreen (ScrollView)
├── StatusHeader (HX-Card/Elevated)
│   ├── StatusBadge (HX-Pill/Status: "PROOF SUBMITTED")
│   ├── StatusTitle: "Review the completed task"
│   └── StatusSubtitle: "Confirm to release payment to the hustler."
├── ProofViewer
│   ├── ProofMedia (full-width, zoomable)
│   └── ProofMeta: "Submitted today at 3:42 PM"
├── TaskSummary (HX-Card/Primary)
│   ├── TaskTitle
│   ├── LocationSummary
│   └── AgreedPrice (explicit)
├── ConfirmationCard (HX-Card/Secondary)
│   ├── ConfirmationText: "Confirming will release $45.00 to the hustler."
│   └── IrreversibilityHint: "This action can't be undone."
├── ActionFooter (sticky)
│   ├── ConfirmButton (HX-Button/Primary): "Release $45.00"
│   └── DisputeButton (HX-Button/Ghost): "Report an issue"
└── SafeAreaBottom
screens.accessibility:
- Initial announcement: "Proof submitted. Review to release payment."
- Confirm button: "Release forty-five dollars to hustler."
- Reduced Motion: identical layout
- Contrast: AA+ everywhere, AAA on price

screens.name: Proof Submitted / Awaiting Confirmation
screens.purpose: Set correct expectations during escrow wait
screens.layoutHierarchy:
ProofAwaitingScreen (ScrollView)
├── StatusHeader (HX-Card/Elevated)
│   ├── StatusBadge (HX-Pill/Status: "AWAITING CONFIRMATION")
│   ├── StatusTitle: "Proof submitted"
│   └── StatusSubtitle: "The poster is reviewing your submission."
├── ProofSummary
│   ├── ProofThumbnail (static, non-interactive)
│   ├── ProofMeta: "Submitted today at 3:42 PM"
│   └── ProofNote: "You can't edit this submission."
├── WhatHappensNext (HX-Card/Primary)
│   ├── 1. The poster reviews your proof.
│   ├── 2. They confirm completion or request a dispute.
│   └── 3. Once confirmed, XP is awarded and payout begins processing.
├── TimingExpectations (HX-Card/Secondary)
│   ├── ExpectedWindow: "Most posters respond within 24 hours."
│   └── AutoCompleteExplanation: "If no response after 48 hours..."
├── NoActionRequired
│   └── "You don't need to do anything right now."
├── SupportBoundary
│   └── ContactPolicyText
└── SafeAreaBottom

allowed: Toast if navigated here after submit

screens.accessibility:
- Initial announcement: "Proof submitted. Awaiting confirmation."
- Reading order matches hierarchy
- Reduced Motion: identical (no motion anyway)
- Contrast: AA+ all text, AAA headers

screens.name: Reward / Level-Up Screen
screens.layoutHierarchy:
RewardScreen (Frame: Full Screen)
├── Overlay (--hx-surface-overlay, animated opacity)
├── ContentContainer (Auto Layout: Vertical, Center)
│   ├── XPBurst
│   │   ├── XPAmount (--hx-num-hero, --hx-xp-gold)
│   │   ├── XPLabel (--hx-text-title-2)
│   │   └── ParticleLayer (8-12 particles)
│   ├── LevelUpContainer (conditional)
│   │   ├── HX-LevelBadge/LevelUp
│   │   ├── LevelText (--hx-text-hero)
│   │   ├── TitleText (--hx-text-title-2)
│   │   └── ConfettiLayer (20-30 particles)
│   ├── ProgressSection
│   │   ├── HX-ProgressBar/XP
│   │   └── ProgressLabel (--hx-text-footnote)
│   └── StreakSection (conditional)
│       ├── HX-StreakBadge/Active
│       └── StreakText (--hx-text-headline)
├── DismissHint (--hx-text-tertiary)
└── SafeAreaBottom
screens.accessibility:
- VoiceOver: "Congratulations! You earned {n} XP. Level up! You are now level {n}."
- Reduce Motion: Full support
- Contrast: AAA on primary elements

---

screens.name: Task Active (In Progress)
screens.purpose: Guide execution, prevent abandonment, surface consequences
screens.layoutHierarchy:
TaskActiveScreen (ScrollView)
├── StatusHeader (HX-Card/Elevated)
│   ├── StatusBadge (HX-Pill/Status: "IN PROGRESS")
│   ├── CountdownTimer (--hx-num-medium)
│   └── DeadlineHint (--hx-text-footnote)
├── TaskSummary
│   ├── TaskTitle
│   ├── LocationSummary
│   └── TimeEstimate
├── ExecutionChecklist
│   ├── ✓ Accepted
│   ├── → Go to the location
│   ├── → Complete the task
│   └── → Submit proof
├── ProofSection
│   ├── ProofInstructions
│   ├── UploadButton
│   └── ProofRequirementsHint
├── ConsequenceCard (HX-Card/Secondary, warning)
│   ├── AutoCompleteWarning
│   └── DisputeExplanation
├── PosterContact (read-only)
│   ├── PosterAvatar
│   ├── PosterName
│   └── ContactPolicyText
├── ProgressFooter (sticky)
│   ├── ProgressIndicator
│   └── SubmitProofButton (HX-Button/Primary)
└── SafeAreaBottom

allowed: Section fade-in on first load only

screens.accessibility:
- Countdown announced on focus: "47 hours remaining"
- Proof button: "Submit proof. Required for payout."
- Reduced Motion: identical layout, zero transitions

screens.name: Task Detail (Hustler)
screens.layoutHierarchy:
TaskDetailScreen (ScrollView)
├── Header
│   ├── CategoryPill (HX-Pill/Category)
│   ├── TaskTitle (--hx-text-title-2)
│   └── DistanceText (--hx-text-footnote)
├── RewardCard (HX-Card/Primary)
│   ├── PayoutAmount (--hx-num-large, dominant)
│   ├── XPAmount (HX-Pill/XP, secondary)
│   └── PayoutStatusHint (--hx-text-footnote)
├── TaskInfoSection
│   ├── Description
│   ├── TimeEstimate
│   ├── LocationSummary
│   └── PostedAt
├── ConstraintWarnings (conditional)
│   ├── NewUserCapWarning
│   ├── ConcurrentLimitWarning
│   └── PhoneVerificationWarning
├── TrustSection
│   ├── PosterAvatar (HX-Avatar/Medium)
│   ├── PosterName
│   └── PosterHistorySummary
├── ActionFooter (sticky, HX-Card/Elevated)
│   ├── AcceptButton (HX-Button/Primary)
│   └── SecondaryText
└── SafeAreaBottom
rules: always visible): "Accepting locks this task and creates a commitment."
screens.accessibility:
- Reading order matches layout
- Accept button announces: "Accept task. Locks commitment."
- Warnings announced before CTA
- Reduced Motion: identical layout, zero transitions
